setup_task.sh line 29 hardcodes this value; verifier.py line 45 confirms it as the expected audit batch
README.md line 40 and verifier.py line 44 confirm: audit records should be created only for attractions with VisitCount >= 1, which are the 5 target attractions

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic data created during initialization. The demodb database is seeded with 14 attractions total: 5 target attractions (Acropolis of Athens, Neuschwanstein Castle, Sagrada Familia, Edinburgh Castle, Brandenburg Gate) and 9 zero-visit attractions. Seven HasVisited edges are created, distributed as follows: Acropolis of Athens receives 2 visits, Neuschwanstein Castle receives 2 visits, and each of Sagrada Familia, Edinburgh Castle, and Brandenburg Gate receives 1 visit. The zero-visit attractions (Colosseum, Pompeii, Stonehenge, Chateau de Chambord, Bran Castle, Eiffel Tower, Statue of Liberty, Big Ben, Parthenon) have no incoming HasVisited edges. The audit batch identifier is 'visit_backfill_2026q1', and 5 audit records are expected corresponding to the 5 attractions with at least one visit.
